description_long: This chest of drawers features a simple, rectangular design with three spacious drawers stacked vertically. The front face displays subtle vertical grooves on each drawer, adding a touch of texture to the otherwise smooth surface. Each drawer is equipped with two small, round knob handles, symmetrically placed for easy access. The sides of the chest have a decorative 'X' pattern, providing a hint of rustic or farmhouse style. The top surface is flat and broad, suitable for placing decorative items or everyday objects. The overall finish is a uniform light gray, giving the piece a clean and modern appearance.
description: A light gray, three-drawer chest with round knob handles and subtle vertical grooves, featuring decorative 'X' patterns on the sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with vertical grooves and round knob handles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the decorative 'X' pattern and the chest's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, flat back with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the 'X' pattern seen on the other side.
